# GreenLine365

> GreenLine365 is an AI-powered business automation platform for local businesses. It combines a premium business directory, AI content creation, automated scheduling, and local trend tracking into one operating system.

## What is GreenLine365?

GreenLine365 is a community operating system for local businesses based in Tampa Bay, Florida. It helps small businesses get discovered, manage their online presence, and automate their marketing — all powered by AI.

The platform has three core engines:
1. Directory Engine (Live) — Business discovery, verified listings, reviews, tier-based subscriptions
2. Lifestyle & Entertainment Engine (Coming Soon) — Social discovery loops and local experiences
3. Competitive League Engine (Coming Soon) — Amateur sports management and leaderboards

## Who is it for?

- Local business owners who want to be found online
- Service businesses (HVAC, plumbing, electrical, landscaping) who miss calls after hours
- Restaurants, bars, and nightlife venues who want reputation management
- Property managers and homeowners who need a "Carfax for Homes"
- Anyone in Tampa Bay who wants to discover local businesses

## Core Features

### Business Directory
- 16 business categories with sub-category filtering
- Individual listing pages with contact info, reviews, gallery, badges, hours, and map
- Three subscription tiers: Free ($0/mo), Pro ($45/mo), Premium ($89/mo)
- Verified badges earned through customer feedback, not purchased
- AI-powered review response drafts

### AI Content Creation
- Blog post generation (500-2000 words in under 2 minutes)
- Social media captions optimized per platform
- Email marketing copy and drip campaigns
- SEO and AEO (AI Engine Optimization) built in
- Brand voice learning — AI adapts to your tone

### Automated Scheduling
- 24/7 AI booking agent handles appointments
- Real-time calendar availability
- SMS and email reminders
- Smart double-booking prevention

### Local Trend Tracking (Live Local Pulse)
- Real-time monitoring from 50+ data sources
- Weather-based marketing alerts
- Competitor activity tracking
- Actionable content ideas based on local trends

### Home Ledger (Property Passport)
- Property history tracking — "Carfax for Homes"
- Incident reporting with AI image analysis
- Digital filing cabinet with AES-256 encryption
- Contractor referral network with ratings

### Blast Deals
- Time-sensitive deals with QR code verification
- Self-hosted QR generation (no external dependencies)
- Universal scan system for all entity types

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | Best For |
|------|-------|----------|
| Free | $0/mo | Basic listing with limited features |
| Pro | $45/mo | Verified badge, CTA buttons, priority search |
| Premium | $89/mo | Full photos, analytics, lead capture, AI reviews |

Consumer plans also available:
- Consumer Plus: $4.99/mo — Loop access, identity passport, personal stats
- Consumer Pro: $9.99/mo — Unlimited loops, AI recaps, priority matching
